monsterMonitor.title: Monster Monitor
monsterMonitor.subtitle: Monitor boss buffs and related data

monsterMonitor.searchTarget.global: Search to Add to Global Monitoring

monsterMonitor.hateDisplayDescription: Enable the monster hate panel separately and configure its style independently.
